message:
feat(ftui-layout): add persisted workspace schema with validation and migration (bd-1efcv)

WorkspaceSnapshot wraps PaneTreeSnapshot with workspace-level metadata,
active pane tracking, and forward-compatible extension bags. Includes
schema versioning, structural validation, deterministic hashing,
canonicalization, and migration scaffolding for future schema evolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
